subcodes.first_line: The book thou didst send hath reached the presence of the Wronged One, and the servant standing before the Countenance hath presented it. We have heard and have answered thee through this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر لدی المظلوم کتابک و عرضه العبد الحاضر لدی الوجه سمعنا و اجبناک بهذا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @unity; oneness of humanity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
